description: american tourister is a brand from samsonite Corporation, which has been in existence since 1933. It is a one stop shop for all your travelling bags, sling bags and back packs.American Tourister is proud to make durable and stylish bags to suit any occasion.Height: 43 cmWidth: 30 cmDepth: 12 cmWarranty: 1 yearMade of polyester for durabilityOne main zipped compartment with an asymmetric opening on both sidesOne smaller zipped compartment on the front with organiser pouches and an asymmetric openingPadded haul loop for easy carryingOne adjustable shoulder strap made of polyester Branded zips and branding appliqué d on the frontBack padding for ergonomic comfortCareClean with a damp cloth when necessary
